description: Responsive layout that places children side-by-side above a width threshold and stacks them vertically below it. No media query breakpoints needed — layout switches based on container width intrinsically.

data-switcher.agent_hint: Activates the switcher layout. Bare attribute.

data-threshold.agent_hint: The min-width of each child before they stack: sm=192px, md=320px, lg=480px.

item.agent_hint: Block children that will switch between horizontal and vertical layout.

do: Use for feature comparison blocks, step-by-step sections
Use data-threshold=sm for tighter side-by-side content
Use data-threshold=lg for content that needs more width before going side-by-side
Let items grow equally to fill space
dont: Do not rely on viewport media queries — this is container-intrinsic
Do not mix items of very different heights without data-align
